evidence_items.reason: This commit created the 05-20 specific evidence intake layer after Grok ruled the parent placeholder must remain HELD until concrete evidence exists. It belongs in the 05-20 ledger as a receipt-backed process move, not as proof of an external fog vector.

replacement_rule: Only replace HELD_PENDING_TODAY_SPECIFIC_RECEIPTS_MOVES_OR_FOG_VECTORS after at least one evidence item is filled and counter-reviewed.
next_required: If passed, update the 05-20 daily ledger evidence array.
If updated, court-lock the 05-20 daily entry.
canon_line: One concrete evidence item has been filled as a process move. Counter-review decides whether it can replace the parent placeholder.
